title: Senior Software Engineer - Kale Consultants South Asia Partners - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Kale Consultants South Asia Partners - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
Kale Consultants South Asia Partners, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Software Engineer for our Visakhapatnam operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Kale Consultants South Asia Partners:
Kale Consultants South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Microservices

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Flexible working hours
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Professional development and training programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Kale Consultants South Asia Partners!
